title: croton doctoris
intro: Croton doctoris, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family native to the Amazon rainforest. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its active compounds such as croton oil and lechlerin. The health benefits associated with Croton doctoris include wound healing, gastrointestinal issues, and anti-ulcerative properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often extracted into oils, tinctures, or ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
